steps.title: Isolate the binomial by dividing both sides by 7
steps.content:
The equation $7(2x-3) = 63$ has a factor of 7 multiplying $(2x-3)$. Divide both sides by 7 to isolate the expression inside the parentheses:

$$\frac{7(2x-3)}{7} = \frac{63}{7}$$

$$2x - 3 = 9$$

This directly matches choice A — A is correct.
